title: Water Bucket, RELEASE!
description: When you place water, well you can guess what you'll hear...
body: Have you ever wanted to here Jack Black screaming when you play Minecraft? Well neither did I, so I made this pack! When you place water, you will hear, "Water Bucket, **RELEASE**", followed by a '_Plop_'. This is undoubtedly what you want to hear when you place water, so download the pack!
